code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
func getTargetForRedirect(target string, domain string) string {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
fw_segments_by_variant:
Duba idan an bayar da URL string na manufa yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
Idan haka ne, mayar da URL na manufa don turawa; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa URL na yankin don turawa.
Yi amfani da tsarin https.

Misalai:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: String na URL na manufa.
@param domain: String na yankin, ba tare da tsari ba.

@return String na URL don turawa.

Duba idan kayan URL da aka bayar na manufa yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
Idan haka ne, mayar da URL ɗin manufa don turawa; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa URL ɗin yankin don turawa.
Yi amfani da tsarin https.

Misalai:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Kayan URL na manufa.
@param domain: Kayan yankin, ba tare da tsari ba.

@return Kayan URL don turawa.

Duba idan kayan URL da aka bayar na manufa suna cikin yankin da aka bayar.
Idan haka ne, mayar da URL ɗin manufa don turawa; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa URL ɗin yankin don turawa.
Yi amfani da tsarin https.

Misalai:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Kayan URL na manufa.
@param domain: Kayan yankin, ba tare da tsari ba.

@return Kayan URL don turawa.

Duba idan adireshin URL da aka bayar yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
Idan haka ne, mayar da adireshin URL don turawa; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa adireshin yankin don turawa.
Yi amfani da ka'idar https.

Misalai:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Adireshin URL da ake nufi.
@param domain: Adireshin yankin, ba tare da ka'ida ba.

@return Adireshin URL don turawa.

Duba idan kayan URL da aka bayar na manufa suna cikin yankin da aka bayar.
Idan haka ne, mayar da URL ɗin manufa don turawa; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa URL ɗin yankin don turawa.
Yi amfani da tsarin https.

Misalai:

	getTargetForRedirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
	getTargetForRedirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Kayan URL na manufa.
@param domain: Kayan yankin, ba tare da tsari ba.

@return Kayan URL don turawa.

code: // {PROMPT_1}func storeInfoInHeader(infoType string, infoContent string, header map[string]string) map[string]string {
prompts_en:
storeInfoInHeader stores the provided information in an existing HTTP response header map under the specified type.
This function considers the following information types: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. They are stored as the keys 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', and 'Cache-Control', respectively.
Information content is read from user requests.
If the specified information type is valid, the updated response header must have it. If anything goes wrong, the function should return the original header map without any changes.

Args:

infoType (string): The type of information to store in the header.
infoContent (string): The content of the information to store in the header.
header (map[string]string): The existing response header map.

Returns:

map[string]string: The updated response header map with the stored information.
fw_segments_by_variant:
storeInfoInHeader yana adana bayanin da aka bayar a cikin taswirar kan HTTP mai wanzuwa a ƙarƙashin nau'in da aka ƙayyade.
Wannan aikin yana la'akari da nau'ikan bayanai masu zuwa: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Ana adana su azaman maɓallai 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', da 'Cache-Control', bi da bi.
Ana karanta abun cikin bayani daga buƙatun mai amfani.
Idan nau'in bayanin da aka ƙayyade yana da inganci, dole ne sabon kan ya ƙunshi shi. Idan wani abu ya ɓace, aikin ya kamata ya mayar da taswirar kan ta asali ba tare da wani canji ba.

Args:

infoType (string): Nau'in bayanin da za a adana a cikin kan.
infoContent (string): Abun cikin bayanin da za a adana a cikin kan.
header (map[string]string): Taswirar kan amsa mai wanzuwa.

Returns:

map[string]string: Taswirar kan amsa da aka sabunta tare da bayanin da aka adana.

storeInfoInHeader yana adana bayanin da aka bayar a cikin taswirar kan HTTP mai wanzuwa a ƙarƙashin nau'in da aka ƙayyade.

Ana karanta abun cikin bayani daga buƙatun mai amfani.
Idan nau'in bayanin da aka ƙayyade yana da inganci, dole ne sabunta kan ya ƙunshi shi. Idan wani abu ya ɓace, aikin ya kamata ya mayar da taswirar kan ta asali ba tare da wani canji ba.

Args:

infoType (string): Nau'in bayanin da za a adana a cikin kan.
infoContent (string): Abun cikin bayanin da za a adana a cikin kan.
header (map[string]string): Taswirar kan amsawa mai wanzuwa.

Returns:

map[string]string: Taswirar kan amsawa da aka sabunta tare da bayanin da aka adana.

storeInfoInHeader yana adana bayanan da aka bayar a cikin taswirar kan HTTP da ke akwai a ƙarƙashin nau'in da aka ƙayyade.
Wannan aikin yana la'akari da nau'ikan bayanai masu zuwa: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Ana adana su azaman maɓallai 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', da 'Cache-Control', bi da bi.
Ana karanta abun cikin bayanai daga buƙatun mai amfani.
Idan nau'in bayanin da aka ƙayyade yana da inganci, dole ne sabunta kan ya ƙunshi shi. Idan wani abu ya ɓace, aikin ya kamata ya mayar da taswirar kan ta asali ba tare da wani canji ba.

Args:

infoType (string): Nau'in bayanin da za a adana a cikin kan.
infoContent (string): Abun cikin bayanin da za a adana a cikin kan.
header (map[string]string): Taswirar kan amsa da ke akwai.

Returns:

map[string]string: Taswirar kan amsa da aka sabunta tare da bayanan da aka adana.

Args:

infoType (string): Nau'in bayanin da za a adana a cikin kan.
infoContent (string): Abun cikin bayanin da za a adana a cikin kan.
header (map[string]string): Taswirar kan martanin da ke akwai.

Returns:

map[string]string: Taswirar kan martanin da aka sabunta tare da bayanan da aka adana.

storeInfoInHeader yana adana bayanan da aka bayar a cikin taswirar maɓallin martanin HTTP da ke akwai a ƙarƙashin nau'in da aka ƙayyade.
Wannan aikin yana la'akari da nau'ikan bayanai masu zuwa: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Ana adana su azaman maɓallai 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', da 'Cache-Control', bi da bi.
Ana karanta abun cikin bayanai daga buƙatun mai amfani.
Idan nau'in bayanin da aka ƙayyade yana da inganci, dole ne maɓallin martanin da aka sabunta ya sami shi. Idan wani abu ya ɓace, aikin ya kamata ya dawo da taswirar maɓallin asali ba tare da wani canji ba.

Args:

infoType (string): Nau'in bayanin da za a adana a cikin maɓalli.
infoContent (string): Abun cikin bayanin da za a adana a cikin maɓalli.
header (map[string]string): Taswirar maɓallin martani da ke akwai.

Returns:

map[string]string: Taswirar maɓallin martanin da aka sabunta tare da bayanan da aka adana.

prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes) for both AES and DES algorithms.
Choose only one algorithm to implement and use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Do NOT choose the algorithm based on the length of the key.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key.
- data: The data to encrypt.
Return:
- The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)
fw_segments_by_variant:
Yi amfani da maɓalli don ɓoye bayanai ta yanayin CBC.
Maɓallin bayit ɗin da aka bayar ya isa (>= bayit 64) don duka AES da DES algorithms.
Zaɓi algorithm ɗaya kawai don aiwatarwa kuma yi amfani da prefix na bayit ɗin maɓalli da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake buƙata.
KADA ka zaɓi algorithm bisa tsawon maɓalli.
Mayar da bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV (initialization vector), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.
Arguments:
- key: Bayit ɗin don samar da maɓallin ɓoyewa.
- data: Bayanan da za a ɓoye.
Return:
- Bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa. (encryptedData, iv, aesKey, error)

prompt_en:
/*
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.
*/
func encryptData(key []byte, data []byte) (encryptedData []byte, iv []byte, aesKey []byte) {
prompts_en:
Encrypt the data with the key using AES and CBC mode.
The provided key bytes is long enough (>= 64 bytes). Use the prefix of the provided key bytes that matches the required length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.

Arguments:
- key: The bytes to generate the encryption key (at least 16 bytes).
- data: The data to encrypt.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): The encrypted data, the IV, and the key used for encryption.

Maɓallin bayitai da aka bayar ya isa (>= bayitai 64). Yi amfani da gaban maɓallin bayitai da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake buƙata.
Mayar da bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV (ƙirar farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.

- key: Bayitai don samar da maɓallin ɓoyewa (aƙalla bayitai 16).
- data: Bayanan da za a ɓoye.

- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): Bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.

Mayar da bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV (ƙirar farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.

Arguments:
- key: Bayit ɗin da za a samar da maɓallin ɓoyewa (aƙalla bayit 16).
- data: Bayanan da za a ɓoye.

Returns:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): Bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.

Yi amfani da maɓalli don ɓoye bayanai ta amfani da AES da yanayin CBC.
Maɓallin bayitai da aka bayar ya isa (>= 64 bayitai). Yi amfani da gindin maɓallin bayitai da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake buƙata.
Mayar da bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV (ƙirar farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.

Dalbai:
- key: Bayitai don samar da maɓallin ɓoyewa (aƙalla bayitai 16).
- data: Bayanan da za a ɓoye.

Mayarwa:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): Bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.

Yi amfani da maɓalli don ɓoye bayanai tare da AES da yanayin CBC.
Maɓallin bayit ɗin da aka bayar ya isa (>= bayit 64). Yi amfani da gaban maɓallin bayit ɗin da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake buƙata.
Mayar da bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV (ƙimar farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.

Dalilai:
- key: Bayit ɗin da za a samar da maɓallin ɓoyewa (aƙalla bayit 16).
- data: Bayanan da za a ɓoye.

Mayar da:
- (encryptedData, iv, aesKey): Bayanan da aka ɓoye, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don ɓoyewa.

/*
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>

	<student>
	    <username>john_doe</username>
	    <password>jdpassword</password>
	    <name>John Doe</name>
	    <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
	    <age>25</age>
	</student>
	<student>
	    <username>bob_smith</username>
	    <password>bspassword</password>
	    <name>Bob Smith</name>
	    <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
	    <age>22</age>
	</student>

</students>

Use these libs:
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree"
"github.com/ChrisTrenkamp/goxpath/tree/xmltree"

We can construct a XPath query and then execute the query to search for the student information.

@param xmlData The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A tuple (name, age, citizenship) if the student is found. Otherwise, returns empty strings.
*/
func getStudentInfo(xmlData, username, password string) (string, string, string) {
